creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #1)
> We delegate it.FreeBSD.org to dscna1.unina.it and dscna2.unina.it too.  Should that > delegation be culled?  What else is in the it.FreeBSD.org zone?

This should be part of a wider clusteradm@ discussion not relevant to this bug.
